verses.2: The LORD also has a controversy with Judah,
verses.3: In the womb he took his brother by the heel,
verses.4: Indeed, he struggled with the angel, and prevailed;
verses.5: even the LORD, the God of Armies.
verses.7: A merchant has dishonest scales in his hand.
verses.8: Ephraim said, “Surely I have become rich.
verses.9: “But I am the LORD your God from the land of Egypt.
verses.10: I have also spoken to the prophets,
verses.12: Jacob fled into the country of Aram.
verses.13: By a prophet the LORD brought Israel up out of Egypt,
